---
title: "Consumer Tech Retail Forecasting Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="ctrd-container fade-in">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="ctrd-header">
    <div class="ctrd-header-text">
      <p class="ctrd-description">
        An end-to-end retail analytics pipeline — from raw transactional data in
        <strong>MongoDB</strong> through exploratory analysis and Holt-Winters
        forecasting to this interactive front-end. The live
        <strong>R Shiny</strong> dashboard (source below) adds drill-down filters,
        ARIMA/ETS model selection, and a real-time MongoDB query preview.
      </p>
      <div class="ctrd-badges">
        <span class="badge-pill badge-r">R / Shiny</span>
        <span class="badge-pill badge-mongo">MongoDB</span>
        <span class="badge-pill badge-forecast">Forecasting</span>
        <span class="badge-pill badge-eda">EDA</span>
        <span class="badge-pill badge-retail">Retail Analytics</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ctrd-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/eric-wong97.github.io/tree/main/shiny-app"
           target="_blank" class="ctrd-btn ctrd-btn-outline">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" style="margin-right:6px"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.012 8.012 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8z"/></svg>
          Source Code
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/eric-wong97.github.io/tree/main/shiny-app#quickstart"
           target="_blank" class="ctrd-btn ctrd-btn-primary">
          Deploy Shiny App ↗
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Architecture card -->
    <div class="ctrd-arch-card">
      <div class="ctrd-arch-title">Pipeline Architecture</div>
      <div class="ctrd-arch-row">
        <div class="ctrd-arch-step">
          <div class="ctrd-arch-icon">🗄️</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-label">MongoDB Atlas</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-sub">15,600 weekly records</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-step">
          <div class="ctrd-arch-icon">🔬</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-label">EDA (R)</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-sub">mongolite + dplyr</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-step">
          <div class="ctrd-arch-icon">📈</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-label">Forecasting</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-sub">ETS / Holt-Winters</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="ctrd-arch-step">
          <div class="ctrd-arch-icon">🖥️</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-label">Shiny Dashboard</div>
          <div class="ctrd-arch-sub">bslib + plotly</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI Row -->
  <div class="ctrd-kpi-row" id="kpi-row">
    <div class="ctrd-kpi-card">
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-label">Total Revenue (3 yr)</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-value" id="kpi-rev">—</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-sub">Jan 2022 – Dec 2024</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-kpi-card">
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-label">Units Sold</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-value" id="kpi-units">—</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-sub">Across all categories</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-kpi-card">
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-label">YoY Revenue Growth</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-value" id="kpi-yoy">—</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-sub">2024 vs 2023</div>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-kpi-card">
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-label">Top Category</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-value" id="kpi-cat">—</div>
      <div class="ctrd-kpi-sub">By total revenue</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Tab Nav -->
  <div class="ctrd-tabs">
    <button class="ctrd-tab active" data-tab="overview">Overview</button>
    <button class="ctrd-tab" data-tab="eda">EDA</button>
    <button class="ctrd-tab" data-tab="forecast">Forecast</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Overview Tab -->
  <div class="ctrd-panel active" id="tab-overview">
    <div class="ctrd-chart-grid-2">
      <div class="ctrd-card">
        <div class="ctrd-card-header">Monthly Revenue Trend</div>
        <canvas id="chart-trend" height="220"></canvas>
      </div>
      <div class="ctrd-card">
        <div class="ctrd-card-header">Revenue by Category</div>
        <canvas id="chart-donut" height="220"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-card" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
      <div class="ctrd-card-header">Revenue by Region</div>
      <canvas id="chart-region" height="160"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- EDA Tab -->
  <div class="ctrd-panel" id="tab-eda">
    <div class="ctrd-chart-grid-2">
      <div class="ctrd-card">
        <div class="ctrd-card-header">Stacked Revenue by Category</div>
        <canvas id="chart-stacked" height="240"></canvas>
      </div>
      <div class="ctrd-card">
        <div class="ctrd-card-header">Brand Revenue Ranking</div>
        <canvas id="chart-brand" height="240"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-card" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
      <div class="ctrd-card-header">Seasonality Index (Revenue vs Annual Mean by Month)</div>
      <canvas id="chart-seasonal" height="180"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Forecast Tab -->
  <div class="ctrd-panel" id="tab-forecast">
    <div class="ctrd-card">
      <div class="ctrd-card-header">
        Holt-Winters Forecast — Jan–Jun 2025
        <span class="ctrd-model-badge">Triple Exponential Smoothing (α=0.3, β=0.1, γ=0.4)</span>
      </div>
      <canvas id="chart-forecast" height="280"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrd-methodology">
      <h4>Forecasting Methodology</h4>
      <p>
        Revenue is modelled with <strong>Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing</strong> (period = 12 months),
        which decomposes the signal into level, trend, and seasonality components. The 95% prediction
        interval widens with forecast horizon, reflecting accumulated uncertainty. In the full
        <strong>R Shiny app</strong>, <code>forecast::ets()</code> automatically selects the optimal
        error/trend/seasonal variant (additive vs multiplicative vs damped) via AIC.
      </p>
      <div class="ctrd-metric-row">
        <div class="ctrd-metric"><span class="ctrd-metric-val" id="metric-rmse">—</span><span class="ctrd-metric-label">RMSE</span></div>
        <div class="ctrd-metric"><span class="ctrd-metric-val" id="metric-mape">—</span><span class="ctrd-metric-label">MAPE</span></div>
        <div class="ctrd-metric"><span class="ctrd-metric-val">6</span><span class="ctrd-metric-label">Month Horizon</span></div>
        <div class="ctrd-metric"><span class="ctrd-metric-val">95%</span><span class="ctrd-metric-label">Confidence</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

<style>
/* ---- Container ---- */
.ctrd-container {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 1.5rem 0 3rem;
}

/* ---- Header ---- */
.ctrd-header {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: start;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .ctrd-header { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.ctrd-description {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: var(--bs-body-color);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.ctrd-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.badge-pill {
  padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  border-radius: 99px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.badge-r        { background: rgba(21,92,214,0.12); color: #155cd6; }
.badge-mongo    { background: rgba(0,168,80,0.12);  color: #00a850; }
.badge-forecast { background: rgba(226,92,74,0.12); color: #e25c4a; }
.badge-eda      { background: rgba(160,74,226,0.12);color: #a04ae2; }
.badge-retail   { background: rgba(240,165,0,0.12); color: #cc8800; }
.ctrd-links { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.ctrd-btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.ctrd-btn-outline {
  border: 1.5px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  color: var(--bs-body-color);
  background: transparent;
}
.ctrd-btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.ctrd-btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: #fff; border: 1.5px solid transparent; }
.ctrd-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); transform: translateY(-1px); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }

/* ---- Architecture card ---- */
.ctrd-arch-card {
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f8f9fa);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  min-width: 380px;
  max-width: 460px;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) { .ctrd-arch-card { min-width: unset; max-width: 100%; } }
.ctrd-arch-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #6c757d; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.ctrd-arch-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.25rem; }
.ctrd-arch-step { text-align: center; flex: 1; }
.ctrd-arch-icon { font-size: 1.6rem; }
.ctrd-arch-label { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
.ctrd-arch-sub { font-size: 0.68rem; color: #6c757d; }
.ctrd-arch-arrow { color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; }

/* ---- KPI row ---- */
.ctrd-kpi-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) { .ctrd-kpi-row { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
.ctrd-kpi-card {
  background: var(--bs-body-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.ctrd-kpi-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
.ctrd-kpi-label { font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #6c757d; font-weight: 600; }
.ctrd-kpi-value { font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Inter', monospace; color: var(--primary); margin: 0.25rem 0; }
.ctrd-kpi-sub { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6c757d; }

/* ---- Tabs ---- */
.ctrd-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--bs-border-color); }
.ctrd-tab {
  background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
  margin-bottom: -2px; padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer; color: #6c757d; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.ctrd-tab:hover { color: var(--primary); }
.ctrd-tab.active { color: var(--primary); border-bottom-color: var(--primary); }

/* ---- Panels ---- */
.ctrd-panel { display: none; }
.ctrd-panel.active { display: block; }

/* ---- Cards & charts ---- */
.ctrd-chart-grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
@media (max-width: 768px) { .ctrd-chart-grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.ctrd-card {
  background: var(--bs-body-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}
.ctrd-card-header {
  font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.92rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem;
}
.ctrd-model-badge {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 400; color: #6c757d;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f8f9fa);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 6px;
}

/* ---- Methodology ---- */
.ctrd-methodology {
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg, #f8f9fa);
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}
.ctrd-methodology h4 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1rem; }
.ctrd-methodology p  { color: var(--bs-body-color); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.ctrd-metric-row { display: flex; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.ctrd-metric { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.ctrd-metric-val { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); font-family: monospace; }
.ctrd-metric-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #6c757d; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
</style>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.3/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<script>
// ---- Embedded pre-computed data ----
const DATA = {"months":["2022-01","2022-02","2022-03","2022-04","2022-05","2022-06","2022-07","2022-08","2022-09","2022-10","2022-11","2022-12","2023-01","2023-02","2023-03","2023-04","2023-05","2023-06","2023-07","2023-08","2023-09","2023-10","2023-11","2023-12","2024-01","2024-02","2024-03","2024-04","2024-05","2024-06","2024-07","2024-08","2024-09","2024-10","2024-11","2024-12"],"rev_series":[15933590.52,13548317.43,15891608.03,14117989.76,14353381.69,8746072.11,7031834.96,7945181.36,7171370.08,11454833.48,14933806.82,18211492.67,17308533.73,14614966.99,16990012.94,15271926.83,15539887.01,9684351.26,9562428.11,6837324.89,7669435.71,12395042.24,16021466.55,19770473.86,18628788.76,15573468.0,17900285.33,19994324.42,13318636.0,10294195.11,10110564.75,7488783.87,10248946.1,10496237.09,17082749.37,21378938.14],"units_series":[30532,25640,30407,26912,27331,16870,13664,15197,13690,22102,28634,35230,33363,28093,32611,29079,29638,18357,18233,13090,14705,23675,30654,37721,35754,29886,34463,38523,25521,19815,19293,14303,19520,20167,32748,40783],"fc_months":["2025-01","2025-02","2025-03","2025-04","2025-05","2025-06"],"fc_vals":[18222909.89,14683518.29,17050210.7,16934933.53,14573960.75,10033712.33],"fc_upper":[22925868.1,21334505.57,25195973.27,26340849.95,25090095.0,21553560.23],"fc_lower":[13519951.68,8032531.01,8904448.14,7529017.11,4057826.5,0],"cats":["Gaming","Laptops","Smart Home","Smartphones","Tablets","Wearables"],"cat_series":{"Gaming":[1499848.2,1241395.51,1407575.35,1367453.93,1300986.88,810875.34,641386.01,726047.51,660639.37,1033291.01,1391633.22,1707333.02,1573299.35,1330049.8,1561104.43,1379756.34,1368606.74,872749.11,892621.55,635848.83,730054.5,1159800.56,1457838.27,1790206.79,1705739.5,1403285.06,1675284.91,1862708.14,1201163.96,929906.76,928331.32,691553.61,957881.51,965765.71,1535859.47,1925171.15],"Laptops":[4080416.18,3587752.49,4218646.48,3751905.08,3768161.49,2230213.94,1844184.04,2064659.91,1887849.44,3026653.13,3836497.25,4926894.2,4400147.48,3717446.94,4427576.82,3906371.69,4069330.01,2508172.3,2479160.06,1779536.12,1985037.22,3174183.89,4220903.31,5128102.18,4965230.18,4034308.86,4621146.8,5268356.9,3458098.19,2717373.63,2685927.25,1936083.89,2660109.23,2794265.93,4453506.65,5554890.92],"Smart Home":[690941.36,569946.82,708157.53,622241.98,623257.48,405002.95,319200.76,351902.46,312407.1,515229.22,653084.39,800825.9,766945.38,659226.51,752832.62,666963.56,682200.97,421697.54,422833.25,305485.43,333469.17,544452.42,704725.89,862607.72,810631.47,703377.96,808939.25,879509.76,596547.07,453065.07,441959.05,329089.43,438616.23,458361.41,756194.42,931763.55],"Smartphones":[6547578.6,5498748.88,6485068.47,5592048.6,5836986.92,3566117.19,2818086.52,3233518.78,2920586.23,4636738.26,6091108.1,7156717.69,7171849.45,6043648.22,6911303.53,6428866.14,6374754.81,3927847.5,3877110.96,2764054.04,3120215.51,5102404.12,6479942.03,8042636.43,7532814.03,6392666.59,7188437.56,7958281.53,5397678.71,4103381.72,4077685.64,3065857.49,4194364.27,4186936.81,6914771.98,8768216.09],"Tablets":[1552106.3,1316530.96,1530498.31,1382717.77,1424935.28,898635.27,704965.15,776985.06,689581.11,1102137.69,1454005.68,1770385.5,1660284.08,1431684.6,1665082.75,1424238.8,1541175.23,975605.13,936737.58,683054.66,749010.13,1193115.26,1611610.27,1965543.63,1822395.06,1508367.09,1776297.27,2044362.78,1335390.14,1029230.21,996636.84,724622.11,1020202.81,1048875.16,1700733.93,2122177.86],"Wearables":[1562699.88,1333942.77,1541661.89,1401622.4,1399053.64,835227.42,704012.48,792067.64,700306.83,1140784.17,1507478.18,1849336.36,1736007.99,1432910.92,1672112.79,1465730.3,1503819.25,978279.68,953964.71,669345.81,751649.18,1221085.99,1546446.78,1981377.11,1791978.52,1531462.44,1830179.54,1981105.31,1329757.93,1061237.72,980024.65,741577.34,977772.05,1042032.07,1721682.92,2076718.57]},"brand_rev":{"Apple":97964888.73,"Samsung":78086267.36,"Google":54626828.5,"OnePlus":49320372.85,"Microsoft":47809155.75,"Lenovo":37217438.58,"Dell":25453070.3,"HP":25448763.91,"Fitbit":11856331.38,"Garmin":11852146.26},"region_rev":{"North America":136269650.47,"Europe":115417550.32,"Asia-Pacific":157187996.71,"Latin America":74646048.47},"kpis":{"total_rev":483521245.97,"total_units":926204,"avg_order":30994.95,"best_cat":"Smartphones","yoy_growth":6.7}};

// ---- Helpers ----
const fmtM  = v => '$' + (v/1e6).toFixed(1) + 'M';
const fmtK  = v => (v/1e3).toFixed(0) + 'K';
const CAT_COLORS = {
  Gaming:       '#4ae2d9',
  Laptops:      '#e25c4a',
  'Smart Home': '#a04ae2',
  Smartphones:  '#4a90e2',
  Tablets:      '#4ae28c',
  Wearables:    '#e2c94a'
};
const REG_COLORS = ['#4a90e2','#63c9a0','#f0a500','#e2604a'];

// Detect dark mode
function isDark() {
  return document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme') === 'dark'
      || document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
}
function chartDefaults() {
  const dark = isDark();
  return {
    color:   dark ? '#cbd5e1' : '#475569',
    gridColor: dark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)',
    tickColor: dark ? '#94a3b8' : '#64748b'
  };
}

// ---- KPIs ----
document.getElementById('kpi-rev').textContent   = fmtM(DATA.kpis.total_rev);
document.getElementById('kpi-units').textContent = fmtK(DATA.kpis.total_units);
document.getElementById('kpi-yoy').textContent   = '+' + DATA.kpis.yoy_growth + '%';
document.getElementById('kpi-cat').textContent   = DATA.kpis.best_cat;

// Compute in-sample RMSE/MAPE for the methodology section
(function computeMetrics() {
  // Naive: last-year same-month as forecast (rough approximation for display)
  const n = DATA.rev_series.length;
  const slen = 12;
  let sse = 0, mape = 0, count = 0;
  for (let i = slen; i < n; i++) {
    const pred = DATA.rev_series[i - slen];
    const err  = DATA.rev_series[i] - pred;
    sse   += err * err;
    mape  += Math.abs(err / DATA.rev_series[i]);
    count++;
  }
  const rmse = Math.sqrt(sse / count);
  const mapeVal = (mape / count * 100).toFixed(1);
  document.getElementById('metric-rmse').textContent = fmtM(rmse);
  document.getElementById('metric-mape').textContent = mapeVal + '%';
})();

// ---- Tab switching ----
document.querySelectorAll('.ctrd-tab').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.ctrd-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.ctrd-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('tab-' + btn.dataset.tab).classList.add('active');
  });
});

// ---- Chart.js global defaults ----
Chart.defaults.font.family = "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif";
Chart.defaults.font.size   = 12;

// ---- Overview: Revenue Trend ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-trend'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: DATA.months,
      datasets: [{
        label: 'Monthly Revenue',
        data:  DATA.rev_series,
        borderColor: '#4a90e2',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(74,144,226,0.08)',
        borderWidth: 2.5,
        pointRadius: 3,
        tension: 0.3,
        fill: true
      }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      plugins: {
        legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: {
          callbacks: {
            label: ctx => ' ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed.y)
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { maxTicksLimit: 12, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } },
        y: { ticks: { callback: fmtM, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- Overview: Category Donut ----
(function() {
  const catTotals = DATA.cats.map(c => DATA.cat_series[c].reduce((a,b)=>a+b, 0));
  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-donut'), {
    type: 'doughnut',
    data: {
      labels: DATA.cats,
      datasets: [{ data: catTotals, backgroundColor: DATA.cats.map(c => CAT_COLORS[c]), borderWidth: 2 }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      cutout: '55%',
      plugins: {
        legend: { position: 'bottom' },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed) } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- Overview: Region Bar ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  const labels = Object.keys(DATA.region_rev);
  const vals   = Object.values(DATA.region_rev);
  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-region'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels,
      datasets: [{ data: vals, backgroundColor: REG_COLORS, borderRadius: 6 }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed.y) } } },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { ticks: { callback: fmtM, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- EDA: Stacked Area ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  const datasets = DATA.cats.map(c => ({
    label: c,
    data: DATA.cat_series[c],
    backgroundColor: CAT_COLORS[c] + 'cc',
    borderColor: CAT_COLORS[c],
    borderWidth: 1,
    fill: true,
    tension: 0.3,
    pointRadius: 0
  }));
  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-stacked'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: { labels: DATA.months, datasets },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
      plugins: {
        legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { boxWidth: 12 } },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + ctx.dataset.label + ': ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed.y) } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { stacked: true, ticks: { maxTicksLimit: 12, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } },
        y: { stacked: true, ticks: { callback: fmtM, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- EDA: Brand Bar (horizontal) ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  const labels = Object.keys(DATA.brand_rev);
  const vals   = Object.values(DATA.brand_rev);
  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-brand'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels,
      datasets: [{ data: vals, backgroundColor: '#4a90e2', borderRadius: 4, barThickness: 16 }]
    },
    options: {
      indexAxis: 'y',
      responsive: true,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: ctx => ' ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed.x) } } },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { callback: fmtM, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } },
        y: { ticks: { color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { display: false } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- EDA: Seasonality line (index by month, 3 year avg) ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  // Compute mean revenue by calendar month across all years
  const byMonth = Array.from({length: 12}, () => []);
  DATA.months.forEach((m, i) => {
    byMonth[parseInt(m.slice(5,7)) - 1].push(DATA.rev_series[i]);
  });
  const meanByMonth = byMonth.map(arr => arr.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/arr.length);
  const overallMean = meanByMonth.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/12;
  const idx = meanByMonth.map(v => +(v/overallMean).toFixed(3));
  const MON = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];

  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-seasonal'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: MON,
      datasets: [{
        label: 'Seasonality Index',
        data: idx,
        backgroundColor: idx.map(v => v >= 1 ? 'rgba(74,144,226,0.75)' : 'rgba(226,92,74,0.65)'),
        borderRadius: 4
      }, {
        label: 'Baseline (1.0)',
        data: Array(12).fill(1),
        type: 'line',
        borderColor: '#6c757d',
        borderDash: [5,4],
        borderWidth: 1.5,
        pointRadius: 0,
        fill: false
      }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      plugins: {
        legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { boxWidth: 12 } },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: ctx => ' Index: ' + ctx.parsed.y } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { min: 0.3, max: 1.8, ticks: { color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } }
      }
    }
  });
})();

// ---- Forecast: Holt-Winters line + CI ribbon ----
(function() {
  const cd = chartDefaults();
  const allLabels = [...DATA.months, ...DATA.fc_months];
  const histLen = DATA.months.length;
  const fcLen   = DATA.fc_months.length;

  // Historical series (padded with null for forecast zone)
  const histData = [...DATA.rev_series, ...Array(fcLen).fill(null)];
  // Forecast series (padded with null for historical zone)
  const fcData   = [...Array(histLen).fill(null), ...DATA.fc_vals];
  // CI bands
  const upperData = [...Array(histLen).fill(null), ...DATA.fc_upper];
  const lowerData = [...Array(histLen).fill(null), ...DATA.fc_lower];

  new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-forecast'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: allLabels,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: 'CI Upper',
          data: upperData,
          borderColor: 'transparent',
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(74,144,226,0.15)',
          fill: '+1',
          pointRadius: 0,
          tension: 0.3
        },
        {
          label: 'CI Lower',
          data: lowerData,
          borderColor: 'transparent',
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(74,144,226,0.15)',
          fill: false,
          pointRadius: 0,
          tension: 0.3
        },
        {
          label: 'Historical Revenue',
          data: histData,
          borderColor: '#4a90e2',
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(74,144,226,0.06)',
          borderWidth: 2.5,
          pointRadius: 3,
          tension: 0.3,
          fill: true
        },
        {
          label: 'Forecast',
          data: fcData,
          borderColor: '#e25c4a',
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(226,92,74,0.08)',
          borderWidth: 2.5,
          borderDash: [6,4],
          pointRadius: 5,
          pointBackgroundColor: '#e25c4a',
          tension: 0.3,
          fill: true
        }
      ]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
      plugins: {
        legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { boxWidth: 12, filter: item => item.text !== 'CI Upper' && item.text !== 'CI Lower' } },
        tooltip: {
          callbacks: {
            label: ctx => {
              if (ctx.dataset.label.startsWith('CI')) return null;
              return ' ' + ctx.dataset.label + ': ' + fmtM(ctx.parsed.y);
            },
            afterBody: (items) => {
              const idx = items[0].dataIndex;
              if (idx >= histLen) {
                const u = DATA.fc_upper[idx - histLen];
                const l = DATA.fc_lower[idx - histLen];
                return ['95% CI: ' + fmtM(l) + ' – ' + fmtM(u)];
              }
              return [];
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { maxTicksLimit: 14, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } },
        y: { ticks: { callback: fmtM, color: cd.tickColor }, grid: { color: cd.gridColor } }
      }
    }
  });
})();
</script>
